scenario.name: Minimal Delayed Offer + UPDATE
scenario.send: INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=tcp SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:75421@test.local>;tag=[call_number][pid] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Contact: <sip:75421@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tcp> Max-Forwards: 70 Session-Expires: 900;refresher=uac Supported: timer Allow: INVITE,ACK,CANCEL,BYE,UPDATE,INFO Content-Length: 0

ACK [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:75421@test.local>;tag=[call_number][pid] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] ACK [routes] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=tandberg 0 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- t=0 0 m=audio 16384 RTP/AVP 8 0 101 c=IN IP4 [local_ip] a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=sendrecv a=ptime:20

UPDATE [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:75421@test.local>;tag=[call_number][pid] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] UPDATE [routes] Contact: <sip:75421@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tcp> Session-Expires: 900;refresher=uac Supported: timer Content-Length: 0

BYE [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:75421@test.local>;tag=[call_number][pid] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] BYE [routes] Content-Length: 0

BYE [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:75421@test.local>;tag=[call_number][pid] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] BYE [routes] Reason: SIP ;cause=408;text="UPDATE timeout - TCP routing bug confirmed" Content-Length: 0
